Title: Edit Aggregation Properties - Add/Remove Properties
Preconditions: Admin logged in; Store exists in system
Steps:
[NAV] Open Store details > Click Aggregation properties widget
[ACT] Select property from left list and click to add
[ACT] Click X icon on Selected properties to remove
[ACT] Click OK to save
Assertions:
[STATE] Filtering properties blade opens with Available and Selected properties lists
[STATE] Selected property moves to Selected properties list
[STATE] Property removed from Selected list when deleted
[STATE] Changes saved successfully
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] PUT /api/stores/{{STORE_ID}}/aggregation-properties returns 200
[CONSOLE] No errors on property add/remove
[ADMIN] Selected properties list reflects changes after save
Failure_Signals: Property not moving between lists; OK button not saving; API returns 400

Title: Edit Aggregation Properties - Property Details
Preconditions: Admin logged in; Store exists; Aggregation properties configured
Steps:
[NAV] Open Aggregation properties for {{STORE_ID}}
[ACT] Select property from Selected properties list
[ACT] Review property details: Name (label), Aggregation type dropdown (Attribute/Range), Aggregation size (Attribute only), Allowed values
[ACT] Enter new value in Allowed values > Click blue field
[ACT] Delete existing values using X icon
[ACT] Click OK to save
[ACT] Make changes and click Cancel > Confirm cancellation
Assertions:
[DOM] Property details blade opens in editable format
[DOM] Property name is label (not editable)
[STATE] Aggregation type dropdown shows Attribute and Range
[STATE] Aggregation size visible only for Attribute type
[STATE] Allowed values editable (add/remove)
[STATE] New value added successfully
[STATE] Existing values deleted
[STATE] Changes saved on OK
[DOM] Cancel shows warning message
[STATE] Changes not saved on Cancel confirmation
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] PUT /api/stores/{{STORE_ID}}/aggregation-properties returns 200
[CONSOLE] No errors during property detail edit
[ADMIN] Property details reflect saved values
Failure_Signals: Aggregation size visible for Range type; Cancel does not warn; Saved changes not persisted

Title: Edit Aggregation Properties - Edit Attribute with Dictionary
Preconditions: Admin logged in; Brand property exists with dictionary values
Steps:
[NAV] Go to Store > Aggregation properties > Select Brand > Edit icon
[ACT] Click Add button in Allowed values > Select value_1 from dropdown
[ACT] Remove value_1 using X icon
[ACT] Click Add > Check value_1 in dictionary
[ACT] Add all values from dictionary
[ACT] Remove one value
[ACT] Remove all values > Save
Assertions:
[STATE] Property details blade opens with Aggregation type Attribute
[DOM] Allowed values shows Add button
[STATE] value_1 added from dictionary dropdown
[STATE] value_1 removed from field
[STATE] value_1 available in dictionary after removal
[STATE] All dictionary values can be added
[STATE] Add button disappears when all values added
[STATE] Add button reappears after removing value
[STATE] All values removed successfully
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] PUT /api/stores/{{STORE_ID}}/aggregation-properties returns 200
[CONSOLE] No dropdown errors
[ADMIN] Allowed values list reflects changes
Failure_Signals: Add button does not hide when all values added; Removed value not returned to dictionary; Save fails

Preconditions: Admin logged in; Store exists; Price property exists
Steps:
[NAV] Go to Store > Aggregation properties > Select Price property > Edit icon
[ACT] Click Add button in Price range bounds > Select value from dropdown
[ACT] Remove value_1 using X icon > Click OK
[ACT] Remove all values > Save

[STATE] Add button displays dropdown with available values
[STATE] New value added to field
[STATE] value_1 removed from field
[STATE] All changes saved

[CONSOLE] No range calculation errors
[ADMIN] Price range bounds reflect updated values

Title: Edit Aggregation Properties - Value Mapping
Preconditions: Admin logged in; Store exists
Assertions:
[STATE] Value mapping section accessible
[STATE] Mapping configuration functional

Title: Enable Tax Calculation Setting
Preconditions: Admin logged in; Store_1 created; User_1 created for Store_1; Tax Provider configured
Steps:
[NAV] Login as Admin at {{BACK_URL}}
[NAV] Go to Store_1 > Settings panel
[ACT] Switch on Enable tax calculation
[ACT] Save
[NAV] Create order on Storefront at {{FRONT_URL}} as User_1
Assertions:
[STATE] Tax calculation toggle switched on
[STATE] Setting saved successfully
[STATE] Taxes calculated according to Tax Provider during checkout
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] GET /api/stores/Store_1/settings returns taxCalculationEnabled=true
[NETWORK] Tax provider API called during checkout
[CONSOLE] No tax calculation errors
Failure_Signals: Toggle state not saved; Tax provider not called; Tax line missing from checkout total

Title: Disable Tax Calculation Setting
Preconditions: Admin logged in; Store_1 created; User_1 created for Store_1
Steps:
[NAV] Login as Admin at {{BACK_URL}}
[NAV] Go to Store_1 > Settings panel
[ACT] Switch off Enable tax calculation
[ACT] Save
[ACT] Clear cache
[NAV] Create order on Storefront at {{FRONT_URL}} as User_1
Assertions:
[STATE] Tax calculation toggle switched off
[STATE] Setting saved successfully
[STATE] Taxes not calculated during checkout
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] GET /api/stores/Store_1/settings returns taxCalculationEnabled=false
[NETWORK] No tax provider API calls during checkout
[CONSOLE] No unexpected tax errors
Failure_Signals: Tax still shown when disabled; Cache clear not effective; Setting reverts to enabled

Title: Allow Anonymous User Setting
Preconditions: Admin logged in; Store_1 created; User_1 created but not logged in
Steps:
[NAV] Login as Admin at {{BACK_URL}}
[NAV] Go to Store_1 > Settings panel
[ACT] Switch on Allow anonymous user for store
[ACT] Save
[NAV] Go to Storefront at {{FRONT_URL}} as User_1 (not logged in)
[ACT] Add product and create order
Assertions:
[STATE] Anonymous user toggle switched on
[STATE] Setting saved
[STATE] Catalog opened for anonymous user
[STATE] User_1 can add product and create order without login
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] GET /api/stores/Store_1/settings returns allowAnonymousUsers=true
[NETWORK] Anonymous cart creation returns 200
[CONSOLE] No auth errors for anonymous session
Failure_Signals: Anonymous user blocked when toggle ON; Order creation fails for anonymous; Catalog not accessible

Title: Disallow Anonymous User Setting
Preconditions: Admin logged in; Store_1 created; User_1 created but not logged in
Steps:
[NAV] Login as Admin at {{BACK_URL}}
[NAV] Go to Store_1 > Settings panel
[ACT] Switch off Allow anonymous user for store
[ACT] Save
[NAV] Go to Storefront at {{FRONT_URL}} as User_1 (not logged in)
[ACT] Attempt to complete checkout
Assertions:
[STATE] Anonymous user toggle switched off
[STATE] Setting saved
[STATE] User_1 not allowed to finish checkout without login
[DOM] Login required message displayed
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] GET /api/stores/Store_1/settings returns allowAnonymousUsers=false
[NETWORK] Anonymous checkout request returns 401/403
[CONSOLE] No unexpected errors
Failure_Signals: Anonymous user can checkout when disabled; Login prompt not shown; Setting not persisted

Title: Allow Anonymous Users to Create Orders (XAPI) - On
Preconditions: Admin logged in; Store exists
Steps:
[NAV] Go to Store > Settings for {{STORE_ID}}
[ASSERT] Verify Allow anonymous users to create orders (XAPI) setting
[ASSERT] Confirm default is True
[NAV] Go to Storefront at {{FRONT_URL}} as Anonymous
[ACT] Add products to cart and create order
[ACT] Open Playground and create order by Anonymous via API
Assertions:
[STATE] Setting Allow anonymous users to create orders (XAPI) is True by default
[STATE] Anonymous user can create order on Storefront
[STATE] Order created successfully
[STATE] Order created via Playground API successfully
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] POST /xapi/order (anonymous) returns 200
[NETWORK] Anonymous order request succeeds
[CONSOLE] No authorization errors
Failure_Signals: Setting not True by default; Anonymous order rejected on Storefront; API returns Unauthorized

Title: Allow Anonymous Users to Create Orders (XAPI) - Off
Preconditions: Admin logged in; Store exists
Steps:
[NAV] Go to Store > Settings for {{STORE_ID}}
[ACT] Switch off Allow anonymous users to create orders (XAPI)
[ACT] Save
[NAV] Go to Storefront at {{FRONT_URL}} as Anonymous
[ACT] Add products to cart
[ACT] Attempt to create order
[ACT] Open Playground and attempt to create order by Anonymous via API
Assertions:
[STATE] Setting switched off successfully
[STATE] Anonymous user cannot create order on Storefront
[STATE] Order creation blocked
[FORMAT] Playground API returns error_code: Unauthorized
[STATE] Anonymous order creation prevented
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] POST /xapi/order (anonymous) returns 401 with error_code: Unauthorized
[NETWORK] Anonymous order request blocked
[CONSOLE] Expected authorization error logged
Failure_Signals: Anonymous order succeeds when disabled; API returns 200 instead of 401; Error code mismatch

Title: Email Address Verification Setting Available
Preconditions: Admin logged in; Store exists
Steps:
[NAV] Go to Store module at {{BACK_URL}}
[ACT] Open any store
[ACT] Click Settings widget
[SCROLL] Scroll through settings list
Assertions:
[DOM] Email address verification toggle visible in settings list
[STATE] Toggle accessible and functional
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] No JS errors on settings blade load
[ADMIN] Toggle visible without any permission errors
Failure_Signals: Toggle not visible in settings; Settings blade fails to load; Toggle not interactive

Title: Enable Email Verification
Preconditions: Admin logged in; Email confirmation notification active; Template_1 set for notification; User_1 created in Store_1 with Email_1
Steps:
[NAV] Go to Stores module > Open Store_1 at {{BACK_URL}}
[ACT] Open Settings blade
[ACT] Switch on Enable email address verification toggle
[ACT] Click OK and Save
[ACT] Reopen Settings blade and verify toggle state
[NAV] Login to Storefront at {{FRONT_URL}} as User_1
[NAV] Go to My Account > Profile
[ACT] Change Email_1 to Email_2
[WAIT] Check Email_2 inbox
[ACT] Open verification email
[ACT] Click verification link
Assertions:
[STATE] Enable email address verification toggle switched on
[STATE] Setting saved in ON position
[STATE] Toggle persists in ON position after reopen
[STATE] Email address verification notification sent to Email_2 inbox
[STATE] Email received with verification link
[NAV] User redirected to email verification page after clicking link
[STATE] Email verification process completed
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[NETWORK] Email notification API called after email change
[CONSOLE] No notification send errors
[ADMIN] User_1 shows unverified email status until link clicked
Failure_Signals: Toggle reverts to OFF after save; No email sent after change; Verification link returns 404; User not redirected to verification page

Title: Disable Email Verification
Preconditions: Admin logged in; Email confirmation notification active; Template_1 set; User_1 created in Store_1 with Email_1
Steps:
[NAV] Go to Stores module > Open Store_1 at {{BACK_URL}}
[ACT] Open Settings blade
[ACT] Switch off Enable email address verification toggle
[ACT] Click OK and Save
[ACT] Reopen Settings blade and verify toggle state
[NAV] Login to Storefront at {{FRONT_URL}} as User_1
[NAV] Go to My Account > Profile
[ACT] Change Email_1 to Email_2
[WAIT] Check Email_2 inbox
Assertions:
[STATE] Enable email address verification toggle switched off
[STATE] Setting saved in OFF position
[STATE] Toggle persists in OFF position after reopen
[STATE] No verification email sent to Email_2 inbox
[STATE] Email address changed without verification
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[NETWORK] No notification API call after email change when disabled
[CONSOLE] No unexpected notification errors
[ADMIN] User_1 email updated immediately without verification step
Failure_Signals: Toggle reverts to ON after save; Verification email sent when disabled; Email change rejected without verification

Title: Disable Email Verification - Statuses Unchanged
Preconditions: Admin on Store page; Verification_link sent to User_1; User_1 assigned to Store_1; Enable email address verification set to TRUE
Steps:
[ACT] Send verification link to User_1
[ACT] Before User_1 verifies, disable Enable email address verification in Store settings
[ACT] Save
[ACT] User_1 clicks verification link
Assertions:
[STATE] Email not verified via disabled link
[DOM] Error message shown
[STATE] Disabling feature does not change existing verification statuses
[STATE] Sent links remain invalid after feature disabled
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[NETWORK] Verification link returns appropriate error (expired/invalid)
[CONSOLE] No unexpected server errors on link click
[ADMIN] User_1 verification status unchanged
Failure_Signals: Verification link succeeds after feature disabled; No error shown to user; User verification status changed by disabling feature

Title: Resend Verification Link - Email Verification ON
Preconditions: Admin logged in; Email confirmation notification active; Template_1 set; User_1 created in Store_1 with Email_1; Enable email address verification enabled
Steps:
[NAV] Login to Backend as Admin at {{BACK_URL}}
[NAV] Go to Security > Users > Open User_1 blade
[ACT] Click Resend link button
[NAV] Go to Email_1 inbox
[ACT] Open received email
Assertions:
[DOM] Resend link button visible
[STATE] Confirmation email sent to Email_1 inbox
[STATE] Email received successfully
[STATE] Email content matches Template_1
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[NETWORK] Email notification API called on Resend click
[CONSOLE] No send errors
[ADMIN] Resend action reflected in user activity
Failure_Signals: Resend button not visible; Email not received; Email content does not match Template_1

Title: Resend Verification Link - Email Verification OFF
Preconditions: Admin logged in; Email confirmation notification active; Template_1 set; User_1 created with Email_1; Enable email address verification disabled
Steps:
[NAV] Login to Backend as Admin at {{BACK_URL}}
[NAV] Go to Security > Users > Open User_1 blade
[ACT] Click Resend link button
[NAV] Go to Email_1 inbox
Assertions:
[DOM] Resend link button visible
[STATE] No confirmation email sent to Email_1 inbox
[STATE] Email verification disabled prevents email sending
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[NETWORK] No email notification API call when verification disabled
[CONSOLE] No unexpected send errors
[ADMIN] Resend action does not trigger email when feature off
Failure_Signals: Email sent when verification is OFF; Resend button hidden; API call made despite feature being disabled

Title: Currency Rounding 001 & Away From Zero
Preconditions: Admin logged in; Store currency configured with Midpoint Rounding = Away from zero; RoundingType = Rounding001; Product_1 created with price $26.25
Steps:
[NAV] Go to Store > Edit default currency > Set RoundingType = Rounding001, Midpoint Rounding = Away from zero
[ACT] Save
[ACT] Add Product_1 (price $26.25) to cart
[ACT] Set quantity to 3
[ASSERT] Verify pricing
Assertions:
[STATE] Rounding settings saved
[MATH] System displays rounded price = 24.94
[MATH] Total = 24.9375 * 3 = 74.81
[STATE] Rounding policy applied correctly
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] Cart API returns prices with correct rounding applied
[CONSOLE] No pricing calculation errors
[ADMIN] Currency rounding settings persisted
Failure_Signals: Wrong rounding mode applied; Price shows unrounded value; Total calculation incorrect; Settings not saved

Title: Currency Rounding 001 & To Zero
Preconditions: Admin logged in; Store currency configured; Product_1 created with price $26.25
Steps:
[NAV] Go to Store > Edit default currency > Set RoundingType = Rounding001, Midpoint Rounding = ToZero
[ACT] Save
[ACT] Add Product_1 (price $26.25) to cart
[ACT] Set quantity to 3
[ASSERT] Verify pricing
Assertions:
[STATE] Rounding settings saved
[MATH] System displays rounded price = 24.94
[MATH] Total = 24.94 * 3 = 74.82
[STATE] Rounding policy applied correctly
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] Cart API returns prices with ToZero rounding applied
[CONSOLE] No pricing calculation errors
[ADMIN] Rounding settings persisted
Failure_Signals: Wrong rounding mode (AwayFromZero) applied; Total = 74.81 instead of 74.82; Settings not saved

[ACT] Set Midpoint Rounding = ToZero, RoundingType = Rounding1 for selected currency only
[ACT] Save

Title: Midpoint Rounding - To Even
Preconditions: Admin logged in; Store currency with Midpoint Rounding = ToEven; RoundingType = Rounding001; Products created: Product_1 ($26.25), Product_2 ($26.48), Product_3 ($26.12); Coupon_1 (5% discount)
Steps:
[ACT] Set Midpoint Rounding = ToEven, RoundingType = Rounding001
[ACT] Add Product_1 (qty 2) to cart > Verify Subtotal = $52.50
[ACT] Add Product_2 (qty 2) > Verify Subtotal = $105.46
[ACT] Add Product_3 (qty 2) > Verify Subtotal = $157.70
[ACT] Apply Coupon_1 (5%) to Product_1 > Verify Subtotal = $155.70, Total = $155.08, Discount = $2.62
[ACT] Checkout > Go to Orders on Storefront > Verify order details
[NAV] Go to Admin > Orders > Find order > Verify Order and Payment details
Assertions:
[STATE] Rounding settings saved
[MATH] Product subtotals calculated correctly with ToEven rounding
[MATH] Discount applied with correct rounding: $2.62
[STATE] Order totals match in Storefront orders
[STATE] Admin order details match calculated values
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] Order API returns totals matching ToEven rounding calculation
[ADMIN] Order details consistent with Storefront values
[CONSOLE] No calculation errors
Failure_Signals: Wrong discount ($2.63 instead of $2.62); Subtotals incorrect; Admin/Storefront order totals mismatch

Title: Midpoint Rounding - Away From Zero
Preconditions: Admin logged in; Store currency with AwayFromZero rounding; Products and Coupon_1 created
Steps:
[ACT] Set Midpoint Rounding = AwayFromZero, RoundingType = Rounding001
[ACT] Add Product_1 (qty 2) > Verify Subtotal = $52.50
[ACT] Add Product_2 (qty 2) > Verify Subtotal = $105.46
[ACT] Add Product_3 (qty 2) > Verify Subtotal = $157.70
[ACT] Apply Coupon_1 (5%) > Verify Subtotal = $155.70, Total = $155.07, Discount = $2.63
[ACT] Checkout > Verify Storefront order details
[ASSERT] Verify Admin order details
Assertions:
[STATE] Rounding settings saved
[MATH] Subtotals calculated with AwayFromZero rounding
[MATH] Discount = $2.63 (rounds away from zero)
[STATE] Order details consistent across Storefront and Admin
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] Order API returns totals matching AwayFromZero rounding
[ADMIN] Order details match Storefront values
[CONSOLE] No rounding calculation errors
Failure_Signals: Discount = $2.62 instead of $2.63; Wrong rounding direction applied; Admin/Storefront totals mismatch

Title: Midpoint Rounding - ToZero
Preconditions: Admin logged in; Store currency with ToZero rounding; Products and Coupons created
Steps:
[ACT] Set Midpoint Rounding = ToZero, RoundingType = Rounding001
[ACT] Add Product_1 (qty 2) > Verify Subtotal = $52.50
[ACT] Add Product_2 (qty 2) > Verify Subtotal = $105.46
[ACT] Add Product_3 (qty 2) > Verify Subtotal = $155.70
[ACT] Apply Coupon_2 (5%) to Product_1 > Verify Subtotal = $155.70, Total = $155.08, Discount = $2.62
[ACT] Remove coupon > Verify Subtotal = $157.50, SubtotalDiscount = $0
[ACT] Apply coupon for total cart 55% > Verify Subtotal = $157.70, Total = $70.96, Discount = $86.74
Assertions:
[STATE] Rounding settings saved
[MATH] Subtotals calculated with ToZero rounding
[MATH] Discount calculations rounded toward zero
[STATE] Coupon removal resets discount
[MATH] Large percentage discount calculated correctly: Total = $70.96, Discount = $86.74
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] Cart and order APIs return totals matching ToZero rounding
[CONSOLE] No coupon calculation errors
[ADMIN] Order discount amounts match calculated values
Failure_Signals: Coupon removal does not reset discount; Large discount calculation incorrect; Wrong rounding direction (AwayFromZero) applied

Title: Midpoint Rounding - To Negative Infinity
Preconditions: Admin logged in; Store currency with To Negative Infinity rounding; Products and Coupons created
Steps:
[ACT] Set Midpoint Rounding = To Negative Infinity, RoundingType = Rounding001
[ACT] Add Product_1 (qty 2) > Verify Subtotal = $52.50
[ACT] Add Product_2 (qty 2) > Verify Subtotal = $105.46
[ACT] Add Product_3 (qty 2) > Verify Subtotal = $155.70
[ACT] Apply Coupon_2 (5%) > Verify Subtotal = $155.70, Total = $155.08, Discount = $2.62
[ACT] Remove coupon > Verify Subtotal = $157.50, SubtotalDiscount = $0
[ACT] Apply coupon 55% to total cart > Verify Subtotal = $157.70, Total = $70.96, Discount = $86.74
Assertions:
[STATE] Rounding settings saved
[MATH] Subtotals calculated with To Negative Infinity rounding
[MATH] Discount rounds toward negative infinity
[STATE] Coupon operations function correctly
[MATH] Large discounts calculated accurately: Total = $70.96, Discount = $86.74
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] Cart and order APIs return totals matching Negative Infinity rounding
[CONSOLE] No coupon calculation errors
[ADMIN] Order totals match Storefront values
Failure_Signals: Wrong rounding mode applied; Coupon removal fails; Large discount total incorrect; Rounding behavior same as ToZero (not distinct)
